Notes: Prereq proves the zone is writable using an existing helper RRset, then the UPDATE deletes a TXT RRset that is absent at absent.campus.edu. Servers may accept the no-op delete or signal NXRRSET.

Steps.Description: Pass an rrset_exists prerequisite on helper.campus.edu. A, then request deletion of an absent TXT RRset at absent.campus.edu.

Steps.Name: absent.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe that the TXT RRset remains absent regardless of the UPDATE reply semantics.
